content.content:
PASS .tmp/patch-user-email/patchUserEmail.test.ts
  AC1 — valid email update
    ✓ returns 200 with the updated user object (1 ms)
    ✓ calls findById with the route param id
  AC2 — email already in use
    ✓ returns 409 with EMAIL_ALREADY_IN_USE when another user owns the email
  AC3 — invalid email format
    ✓ returns 400 for email="not-an-email"
    ✓ returns 400 for email="missing@tld"
    ✓ returns 400 for email="@nodomain.com"
    ✓ returns 400 for email="spaces in@email.com"
    ✓ returns 400 for email=""
    ✓ returns 400 for email=null
    ✓ returns 400 for email=undefined
  AC4 — user not found
    ✓ returns 404 with USER_NOT_FOUND when the id does not match any user
  AC5 — same email is idempotent
    ✓ returns 200 with the current user and does NOT call updateEmail
  Guard ordering
    ✓ validates email format BEFORE checking if user exists (AC3 takes priority over AC4)

Test Suites: 1 passed, 1 total
Tests:       13 passed, 13 total
Snapshots:   0 total
Time:        0.446 s, estimated 1 s
